title: What should I do if I forget to fill in tag/memo?
content: If tag/memo is missing or incorrect, funds may not be credited correctly. Collect token, amount, correct/incorrect memo and transaction hash, then contact support via chatbot ticket flow.

title: Why is my verification not approved?
content: Verification can fail due to mismatch, expired or unclear documents. User should resubmit valid documents and follow review instructions.

title: Why has not my deposit been credited?
content: Typical causes include insufficient confirmations, missing memo/tag, unsupported network, or maintenance window. Check chain confirmations and required network params first.

title: Your Guide to Binance Deposit/Withdrawal
content: Before transfer, user must match coin and network exactly, verify address/tag requirements, and check fee/minimum constraints.

title: Binance Support Center root
content: Binance support center hosts FAQ and announcements used for customer-service retrieval. Use announcement category and FAQ query to enrich KB continuously.
